home.heroSubtitle: You handle your side. We handle the rest. We provide end-to-end garment manufacturing with strict quality control. Predictable lead times, robust capacity, and straightforward communication for global B2B buyers.
home.processTitle: How We Streamline Your Supply Chain
home.processStep1Desc: Strict incoming quality control for fabrics and trims before bulk cutting.
home.processStep2Desc: Line-balanced sewing operations with continuous in-process inspections.
home.processStep3Desc: AQL standard inspections and organized dispatch to nominated forwarders.
home.chartSubtitle: Scalable production lines tailored to core garment categories with rigorous milestone tracking to ensure we meet strict delivery windows.
home.flowStep1Desc: Fabric & trim validation with certified mills.
home.flowStep2Desc: Fit approvals and tech pack translation.
home.flowStep3Desc: Precision cutting, sewing, and in-line QA.
home.ctaTitle: Ready to discuss your production needs?
home.ctaDesc: Our team responds within 2 hours with capacity details and pricing guidance.
home.trustedEyebrow: Trusted supply chain partner for leading global retailers:

about.heroTitle: A Garment Wholesale Company Built for Reliable Partnership
about.heroSubtitle: Operated by a highly efficient US-China dual team, Mijenro International bridges global buyers with disciplined garment production teams. Our philosophy: predictable execution, transparent communication, and measurable quality.
about.approachTitle: Agile Garment Manufacturing Built for Today's Market
about.approachSubtitle: As a newly established, forward-thinking wholesale partner, we leverage modern supply chain strategies, digital communication, and strict operational transparency to deliver premium garments on time.
about.valuesTitle: What Partners Can Expect Working With Us
about.value1Desc: We prioritize your requirements over complex processes and build partnerships that withstand time, focusing on sustainable growth over quick wins.
about.value2Desc: We handle the complexities of manufacturing across borders, leaving you with simple, trackable milestones.
about.value3Desc: Promises delivered. Each program has clear ownership and structured updates on production and shipping progress.
about.ctaTitle: Need a Stronger Vendor Narrative for Your Buying Team?
about.ctaSubtitle: We can share a concise company deck and capability profile aligned to your target garment category.
about.trustedEyebrow: Trusted supply chain partner for leading global retailers:

capabilities.heroTitle: Complete Program Support for Garment Wholesale Growth
capabilities.heroSubtitle: Mijenro combines sourcing intelligence, product development, controlled production, and logistics management to help buyers scale without compromising quality.
capabilities.servicesTitle: Designed Around Buyer and Brand Workflows
capabilities.service1Desc: Fabric mill matching, trim sourcing, and target-cost alignment for each category.
capabilities.service2Desc: Prototype and fit sample management with structured revision tracking.
capabilities.service3Desc: Line balancing, milestone management, and risk control for confirmed purchase orders.
capabilities.service4Desc: Packaging standards, document preparation, and shipment handoff to your nominated forwarder.
capabilities.cat1Desc: T-shirts, polos, hoodies, sweatshirts, and knit bottoms for seasonal and evergreen lines.
capabilities.cat2Desc: Corporate uniforms, utility garments, and high-repeat reorder programs.
capabilities.cat3Desc: Age-segmented fits, labeling compliance support, and multi-pack retail programs.
capabilities.cat4Desc: Event-driven merchandise and campaign products with controlled lead times.
capabilities.step1Desc: We operate a slim, boss-direct team. We map your category, volume, pricing, and compliance expectations rapidly.
capabilities.step2Desc: If we can't do it, we tell you early. If we commit, we deliver development, production, and delivery windows with guaranteed checkpoints.
capabilities.step3Desc: Clear weekly updates keep you informed at every stage. Complete visibility from cutting through to shipment — no chasing required.
capabilities.ctaTitle: Need a Capability Match Against Your Product Plan?
capabilities.ctaSubtitle: Send your target category and expected MOQ. We will suggest a partnership model that fits.

manufacturing.heroTitle: Manufacturing Systems Designed for Quality and Scale
manufacturing.heroSubtitle: Our production partner network combines modern machinery, skilled garment technicians, and process-driven quality assurance to support reliable wholesale fulfillment.
manufacturing.flowSubtitle: Adapted for wholesale programs requiring repeat quality at stable commercial lead times.
manufacturing.flow1Desc: Incoming fabric and trims are checked against approved references before release.
manufacturing.flow2Desc: Marker planning and cutting control reduce variance and improve yield consistency.
manufacturing.flow3Desc: Operator allocation and in-line checkpoints ensure workmanship stability at volume.
manufacturing.flow4Desc: Pressing, labeling, and carton setup follow buyer specifications and routing standards.
manufacturing.flow5Desc: Random inspection and shipment document checks are completed before goods release.
manufacturing.qaTitle: Control Points That Protect Buyer Confidence
manufacturing.qa1Desc: Cross-team alignment before mass production starts for each purchase order.
manufacturing.qa2Desc: Measurement and workmanship checks throughout the sewing and finishing phases.
manufacturing.qa3Desc: Document and packaging verification for destination market compliance.
manufacturing.ctaTitle: Need Factory Detail for Internal Vendor Approval?
manufacturing.ctaSubtitle: Contact us for process documentation and category-specific production references.

sustainability.heroTitle: Responsible Production Practices for Global Wholesale Buyers
sustainability.heroSubtitle: Mijenro International supports partners with practical sustainability and compliance initiatives that fit real production environments and customer requirements.
sustainability.areasTitle: Focused on What Buyers Review Most
sustainability.area1Desc: Working-hour controls, wage records, and worker welfare practices monitored at site level.
sustainability.area2Desc: Safety drills, equipment controls, and maintenance logs integrated into routine operations.
sustainability.area3Desc: Waste classification, utility monitoring, and reduction targets with periodic internal reviews.
sustainability.cert1Desc: Third-party assessment summaries and remediation tracking where applicable.
sustainability.cert2Desc: Process SOP overviews and inspection records for purchase order execution.
sustainability.cert3Desc: Material declarations and supplier communication for product compliance readiness.
sustainability.ctaTitle: Need Compliance Background for Vendor Setup?
sustainability.ctaSubtitle: Contact us to request our standard compliance and quality information package.

contact.heroTitle: Let’s Discuss Your Garment Wholesale Requirements
contact.heroSubtitle: Share your category, estimated order volume, and target market. Our team will respond with a practical collaboration path and suggested next steps.
contact.formSubtitle: Please provide core requirements so we can align the right merchandising and production resources.
contact.placeholderNotes: Share lead-time expectations, target cost, and quality requirements.
contact.faq1Q: How do you differ from other traders?
contact.faq1A: We stand with our clients. We keep our commitments, and if there's an issue, we report it immediately—never waiting until goods arrive.
contact.faq2Q: What is your MOQ (Minimum Order Quantity)?
contact.faq2A: Typically 500-1000 pieces per style, depending on the specific product category and fabric requirements.
contact.faq3Q: How do you ensure product quality?
contact.faq3A: We conduct preemptive inspections and will notify you of any issues proactively. We don't hide problems.

footer.descHome: Built for long-term wholesale relationships in the garment industry.
footer.descAbout: Ready to build practical, long-term partnership models in garment wholesale.
